content.speakerText: Could you approve my request for a business trip to Tokyo next month?
content.speakerTextCn: 你能批准我下个月去东京出差的申请吗？
expectedAnswers: I can approve it if you provide the itinerary and estimated costs by Friday.
Sure, as long as you complete the travel form and get IT’s approval first.
That works. Just make sure to book the flight through our preferred vendor.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回应了审批请求
语言准确性：是否使用了条件句和专业表达
表达自然度：是否符合经理语气，不过于生硬或随意
关键词覆盖：是否包含 approve, business trip, Tokyo, next month, form, itinerary 等关键词
